pipeline.title: 用 Yes/No 回答一般疑问句

items.answer: Are you a student? — Yes, I am.

items.zh: 你喜欢咖啡吗？——不，我不喜欢。
items.answer: Do you like coffee? — No, I don't.
Can you swim? — Yes, I can.
Are you ready? — No, I'm not.
Does she speak French? — Yes, she does.
Is it big? — No, it isn't.
Is anyone here? — Yes, there is.
Are you sure? — Yes, I am sure.
Is that correct? — Yes, it is.

items.zh: 你明白我的意思吗？——明白。
items.answer: Do you understand me? — Yes, I do.

pipeline.title: Can I ask / Is that correct / Am I wrong 问答操练

items.answer: Can I ask you something? — Sure.
Is that correct? — Yes, it is.
Am I wrong? — No, you're not.
Do you understand? — Yes, I do.

items.zh: 你能再解释一遍吗？——好的。
items.answer: Can you explain that again? — OK.
I want to ask you a question.
I want to ask my mom.
I want to ask for directions.
Are you sure he is correct?
Do you understand what he is saying?

levels.label: 提问
levels.en: Can I ask you a question?

levels.label: 加确认
levels.en: Can I ask you a question? Are you sure about this?
levels.zh: 我能问你个问题吗？你确定吗？

levels.label: 加理解
levels.en: Can I ask you a question? Are you sure about this? Do you understand me?
levels.zh: 我能问你个问题吗？你确定吗？你明白我的意思吗？

pipeline.title: 用 yesterday / ago / last 造过去问句

items.answer: Did you see him two days ago?
Were you at home last night?
Did you eat after the meeting?

pipeline.title: Did you...? — Yes/No, I... 过去问答操练

items.zh: 你昨天去学校了吗？——去了。
items.answer: Did you go to school yesterday? — Yes, I did.

items.zh: 你昨晚看电视了吗？——没看。
items.answer: Did you watch TV last night? — No, I didn't.

items.zh: 你上周打电话了吗？——打了两次。
items.answer: Did you call last week? — Yes, I called twice.

items.zh: 你已经吃了吗？——已经吃了。
items.answer: Did you eat already? — Yes, I already ate.

items.zh: 你周末过得好吗？——非常好。
items.answer: Did you have a good weekend? — Yes, it was great.
Did you go to school yesterday?

items.zh: 我每周给她打一次电话。
items.answer: I call her once a week.
I brush my teeth twice a day.
Did you only meet him once?

levels.label: 加细节
levels.en: Did you eat? — Yes, I already ate. I ate noodles.
levels.zh: 你吃了吗？——已经吃了。吃了面条。
levels.highlight: Yes, I already ate. I ate noodles.

levels.label: 加反问
levels.en: Did you eat? — Yes, I already ate. How about you? Did you eat yet?
levels.zh: 你吃了吗？——已经吃了。你呢？你吃了吗？
levels.highlight: How about you? Did you eat yet?

pipeline.title: 用 person / place / time / thing 回答 W 问句

items.answer: Where is the bathroom? — Over there.
When do you get up? — At 7.

items.zh: 你为什么迟到？——因为堵车。
items.answer: Why are you late? — Because of traffic.
Which one is yours? — The blue one.
Do you want both? — Yes, both.
Each is good. — Yes, each is good.

pipeline.title: What is the reason / Which way 问答操练

items.answer: What is the reason? — I don't know.
Which way is the station? — This way.

items.zh: 你喜欢什么类型的音乐？——流行。
items.answer: What type of music do you like? — Pop.
Which one do you want? — Each is good.
What place do you like best?
Did I find the right place?
What time do you get up?

items.zh: 学英语最好的方式是每天练习。
items.answer: The best way to learn English is to practice every day.

pipeline.title: 从 W 问到详情逐步扩展

levels.label: 加时间
levels.en: Where is this place? What time does it open?
levels.zh: 这个地方在哪里？几点开门？

levels.label: 加方式
levels.en: Where is this place? What time does it open? Which way should I go?
levels.zh: 这个地方在哪里？几点开门？我应该怎么走？

pipeline.title: 用 happen / matter / problem / news 扩展 What 问句

items.zh: 你最喜欢的食物是什么？

items.answer: Whose book is this? — It's mine.
Who does this bag belong to?

pipeline.title: Why...? — Because... 因果问答操练

items.zh: 你为什么迟到？——因为我错过了公交。
items.answer: Why are you late? — Because I missed the bus.

items.zh: 你为什么累？——因为我熬夜了。
items.answer: Why are you tired? — Because I stayed up late.

items.zh: 他为什么高兴？——因为他有了新工作。
items.answer: Why is he happy? — Because he got a new job.

items.zh: 你为什么这么担心？——因为我丢了钱包。
items.answer: Why do you worry so much? — Because I lost my wallet.

items.zh: 她为什么没来？——因为她生病了。
items.answer: Why didn't she come? — Because she is sick.

items.zh: 你最喜欢的食物是什么？
你最喜欢的颜色是什么？
你最喜欢的电影是什么？
我最喜欢的食物是披萨。
我最喜欢的颜色是蓝色。
我最喜欢的地方是海滩。
items.answer: My favorite place is the beach.

items.zh: 夏天是我最喜欢的季节。

items.answer: Do you have any good ideas?
I have no idea where he is.
I have no idea what to do.

items.zh: 没关系，这种事总会发生。

pipeline.title: 从问事到问原因逐步扩展

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: What happened? Why are you crying?
levels.zh: 发生了什么事？你为什么哭？

levels.label: 加看法
levels.en: What happened? Why are you crying? What is your idea to fix it?
levels.zh: 发生了什么事？你为什么哭？你有什么办法解决？
levels.highlight: What is your idea to fix it?

pipeline.title: 用 dollar / yuan / pay / cost 表达价格

items.answer: How much is this? — Ten dollars.
How much is it? — Fifty yuan.
How much does this shirt cost?
How much change do I get?

pipeline.title: How much to pay / How much does it cost 问答操练

items.answer: How much did you pay? — Fifty yuan.
How much does this cost? — Twenty dollars.
How much is the total? — One hundred yuan.
I need to pay fifty yuan.
How much does this shirt cost?
How much does the ticket cost?
Do you have cash with you?
I only have a card, no cash.

items.zh: 能不能刷卡？我没带现金。
items.answer: Can I pay by card? I don't have cash.

pipeline.title: 从问价到付款逐步扩展

levels.label: 加支付
levels.en: How much does this cost? Can I pay in cash?
levels.zh: 这个多少钱？我能付现金吗？

levels.label: 加收据
levels.en: How much does this cost? Can I pay in cash? Can I have a receipt?
levels.zh: 这个多少钱？我能付现金吗？能给我收据吗？

pipeline.title: 用 feel / fast / slow / well / better 描述状态

items.answer: How well do you know him?

pipeline.title: How do you feel / How fast / How often 问答操练

items.answer: How do you feel? — I feel great.
How fast can you run? — Very fast.
How often do you exercise? — Every day.

items.zh: 你说英语说得好吗？——还不错。
items.answer: How well do you speak English? — Not bad.

items.zh: 你感觉好点了吗？——好多了。
items.answer: Do you feel better? — Much better.
How do you feel about it?

items.zh: 我希望你能快点好起来。
items.answer: I hope you feel better soon.
It will be better next time.
Take your time. Do it slowly.

levels.label: 加关心
levels.en: How do you feel? Are you feeling better today?
levels.zh: 你感觉怎么样？今天好点了吗？

levels.label: 加提议
levels.en: How do you feel? Are you feeling better? How about a walk to feel better?
levels.zh: 你感觉怎么样？好点了吗？出去走走也许会好点？
levels.highlight: How about a walk to feel better?
